prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of AMGN, I used typical daily volatility patterns for large-cap biotech stocks. AMGN historically exhibits moderate daily volatility of approximately 1-2%. The point estimate assumes no significant directional bias over such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming roughly normal distribution of daily returns, with the 50% CI capturing typical intraday movement (~0.9% each direction), 80% CI capturing moderate daily swings (~1.7% each direction), and 90% CI accounting for larger but not extreme daily moves (~2.4% each direction).
